meta.purpose: Protocol support baseline for IoTEdges self-developed product models, used to keep product pages, SEO briefs and engineering requirements aligned.
meta.important_note: This matrix defines planned support tiers. Final protocol claims require firmware implementation, compatibility testing, documentation and field validation.

support_status_values.baseline: Core protocol support planned for the model family.
support_status_values.advanced_model_only: Supported only by advanced/edge models, not by baseline gateway models.
support_status_values.optional_after_validation: Potential support after engineering validation; do not publish as a claim yet.

global_rules: IEG-100, IEG-120 and IEG-140 gateway models should focus on Modbus RTU/TCP data collection and MQTT publishing.
OPC UA, BACnet and CAN should not be claimed on baseline gateway models.
OPC UA, BACnet and CAN belong to IEG-E200 or later advanced edge gateway variants after implementation and testing.
RTU models can support Modbus RTU and MQTT telemetry, but should not be positioned as full protocol-conversion gateways unless firmware supports it.
Remote IO models should focus on Modbus IO and signal collection/control, not cloud gateway behavior.
LoRa/LoRaWAN models should focus on LoRaWAN uplink and MQTT/application integration at the gateway/platform layer.

models.seo_positioning: Ethernet MQTT Gateway, Modbus Gateway, Modbus to MQTT Gateway, Ethernet Industrial Gateway
WiFi MQTT Gateway, WiFi Industrial IoT Gateway, Modbus to MQTT Gateway
4G MQTT Gateway, Cellular IoT Gateway, 4G Modbus Gateway, Remote Modbus to MQTT Gateway

models.uplink: Ethernet baseline; separate wireless-uplink variants only
models.seo_positioning: Edge IoT Gateway, MQTT Edge Gateway, OPC UA Gateway, PLC to MQTT Gateway
Ethernet RTU, Industrial RTU, RTU for SCADA
WiFi RTU, WiFi Remote Monitoring RTU
4G RTU, Cellular RTU, Remote Monitoring RTU
Modbus Remote IO, RS485 Remote IO, Ethernet Remote IO

models.uplink: LoRa/LoRaWAN wireless side plus Ethernet backhaul
models.seo_positioning: LoRaWAN Gateway, Industrial LoRa Gateway, LoRa MQTT Gateway
LoRa Remote IO, Wireless Remote IO, LoRa Sensor Node

safe_gateway_claims: Baseline gateway models are planned around Modbus RTU/TCP data collection and MQTT publishing.
Ethernet, WiFi and 4G gateway variants share the same baseline protocol role but use different uplink methods.
claims_to_avoid_on_baseline_gateways: PLC programming or safety controller behavior
advanced_gateway_claims_after_validation: Local rules and edge data filtering

next_actions: Use this matrix when creating engineering requirement documents for each model.
Update product-model-definition-draft.json only after a protocol moves from planned to implemented and tested.
Use OPC UA, BACnet and CAN SEO pages only for IEG-E200 or later advanced models.
